gaps.description: All core modules (detector/, engine/, runtime/, server/, cli/, store/, tunnel.js, config.js, index.js, ui/) are implemented matching ARCHITECTURE.md — M101 engine registry unification complete, voice adapter API signatures documented
M103 basic stability features (OpenAI error format with code field, audio format validation, /api/health endpoint) are implemented in api.js and middleware.js
GET /api/health response structure — task to fix nested components structure completed and verified
ARCHITECTURE.md Known Limitations section — update task in review, pending tester verification
Architecture diagram adapter path labels (adapters/sense.js → runtime/adapters/sense.js) — included in Known Limitations update task, in review
src/engine/health.js (engine health check + auto-degradation) — implemented, tested, verified by tester
src/server/queue.js (request queue + concurrency control) — implemented, tested, verified by tester
Retry logic in engine/ollama.js and engine/cloud.js — implemented, in review pending tester verification
Auth middleware (AGENTIC_API_KEY bearer token) in middleware.js — implemented, tested, verified by tester
Graceful shutdown (shutdown.js) — implemented, in review pending tester verification
